treatment_information.treatment_response: No benefit obtained, skin lesions worsened
Improvement in intestinal permeability and absorption studies two years following reinstitution

treatment_timeline.event: Dapsone commenced for presumed dermatitis herpetiformis
Dapsone withdrawn after two weeks due to no benefit and worsening skin lesions
Skin biopsy revealed features typical of porphyria, excluding dermatitis herpetiformis
Diagnosis of variegate porphyria confirmed by blood, urine, and fecal analysis
Duodenal biopsy showed near-total villous atrophy, confirming celiac disease
Two years after diagnosis, patient developed worsening skin lesions during pregnancy despite sun screens

patient_outcome.complications: Worsening skin lesions, scarring, and hyperpigmentation during pregnancy
patient_outcome.patient_perspective: Patient felt that skin lesions worsened during dapsone treatment
